allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
